result.summary: Analyzed sub_layer_0_01_ai_system: AALang is the primary AI programming language system with 42 files, using a 4-mode-13-actor architecture for building LLM agents

content.purpose: AALang (Actor-based Agent Language) is the PRIMARY AI SYSTEM - a programming language designed specifically for LLM agent consumption and execution. GAB (Generic AALang Builder) is the compiler that helps build AALang-based products. This is the foundation for how AI agents work throughout the entire layer-stage system.

keyComponents.name: AALang Core
keyComponents.description: Main language specification and compiler using JSON-LD graph format

keyComponents.name: AATest
keyComponents.description: Comprehensive testing framework for AALang products with message-based testing

keyComponents.name: Compressor
keyComponents.description: Huffman compression utilities for AALang files

keyComponents.name: Documentation
keyComponents.description: Comprehensive docs including best practices, Turing completeness analysis, language classification arguments

keyComponents.name: Tests
keyComponents.description: Test suites for both GAB and AATest including message-response, message-flow, and agent-workflow tests

keyFeatures: JSON-LD graph-native format for LLM execution
Reduced hallucinations through explicit mode constraints
MCP (Model Context Protocol) and A2A (Agent to Agent) ready
Actors are stateful reasoning units with modes
Personas are optional internal reasoning patterns within actors
content.integration: Applies to ALL layers (0,1,-1), ALL stages (01-11), ALL sub_layers, and any nesting depth in the layer-stage framework
